hero.eyebrow: Math games built for quick thinking
hero.title: Train calculation and logic with short challenges
hero.subtitle: arithmetix blends against-the-clock games with no-timer learning mode so students can improve at their own pace.

clock.title: Against the clock
clock.text: Fast rounds designed to sharpen response speed and accuracy.

learn.title: Learning mode
learn.text: The same mechanics, no timer, and full focus on understanding every step.

cloud.title: Cloud leaderboard
cloud.text: Save scores with Google and compare your progress per game.
